hooks:
  PreToolUse:
    description: Fires before any tool use
    blocking: true
  PostToolUse:
    description: Fires after any tool use
    blocking: false
  Stop:
    description: Fires when generation stops
    blocking: false

tools:
  shell:
    native: BashTool
  file_read:
    native: ReadTool
  file_write:
    native: WriteTool
  file_edit:
    native: EditTool
